top_signals.title: U.S. issues sweeping Iran oil sanctions waivers, unlocking billions in revenue for Tehran
top_signals.summary: The U.S. issued a sweeping rollback of sanctions on Iranian oil, offering Tehran an economic lifeline as negotiations toward a peace deal proceed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US and Qatar claim EU methane rules will trigger gas supply crunch
top_signals.summary: Warning comes ahead of EU energy ministers meeting — but is disputed by industry experts

top_signals.title: Op-Ed: Brazil’s rare earth dilemma — strategic autonomy or another raw-material export cycle?
top_signals.summary: Serra Verde is key for Brazil's rare earths, influencing their role in a non-Chinese mine-to-magnet supply chain.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Why tokenized SpaceX shares broke before retail investors could buy them
top_signals.summary: Tokenized SpaceX shares drew more than $1 billion in demand, but many investors received refunds instead. What went wrong?
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bulgaria allowed surveillance tech firm to sell products to repressive regimes, report says
top_signals.summary: The nonprofit Human Rights Watch obtained export licensing records covering 2018 through 2023, which show the Bulgarian government allowed the surveillance firm Circles to peddle the tech to law enforcement and intelligence agencies in several countries known for human rights abuses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: HMRC new tax charge on cash ISAs faces industry backlash
top_signals.summary: HMRC has revealed plans for the UK’s new ISA regime, which will see it tax interest on cash held in stocks and shares ISAs at 22 per cent, prompting fierce backlash from industry figures. The government department updated the market on three rules that will create the core of its ISA reforms from April 2027, [...]
